title: Coinbase Feels Heat as Business Model Cracks under Strain
text: Coinbase's share price tumbled as the Nasdaq-listed cryptocurrency exchange's core business model was challenged on two sides: by Wells Fargo, which gave it what amounts to a sell rating, and by famed short-seller Jim Chanos, who called it emblematic of the “predatory junkyard that is crypto.” Harsh words.
